description: Synthetic alcohol label fixtures for manual review and deterministic backend tests.
standard_government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

test_cases.title: Valid bourbon baseline

mock_extracted_fields.government_warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

notes: Baseline case where all currently supported fields match.

test_cases.title: Brand capitalization normalization

mock_extracted_fields.government_warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

notes: Brand name should pass after capitalization normalization.

test_cases.title: Alcohol content mismatch

mock_extracted_fields.government_warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

notes: Alcohol content should fail because the application expects 45% ABV / 90 proof and the label shows 40% ABV / 80 proof.

test_cases.title: Missing standard government warning

mock_extracted_fields.government_warning_text: NO GOVERNMENT WARNING STATEMENT PRINTED ON THIS LABEL

notes: Government warning should fail because the standard warning text is not present.

test_cases.title: Government warning heading wrong case

mock_extracted_fields.government_warning_text: Government Warning: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

notes: Government warning should fail because the heading is title case instead of uppercase.

test_cases.title: Net contents mismatch

context_fields.bottler_producer: North Star Rum Co., Miami, FL

mock_extracted_fields.government_warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

notes: Net contents should fail because the application expects 750 mL and the label shows 700 mL.

test_cases.title: Class/type mismatch

mock_extracted_fields.government_warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

notes: Class/type should fail because the application expects Vodka and the label shows Spiced Rum.

test_cases.title: Country-of-origin mismatch future-scope case

context_fields.bottler_producer: Atlantic Beverage Importers, New York, NY

mock_extracted_fields.government_warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

notes: Country of origin intentionally differs, but the current API does not verify country_of_origin. This fixture should pass for currently supported fields and remain documented as future scope.

test_cases.title: Valid wine with rotation and glare

mock_extracted_fields.government_warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

notes: Image is rotated with glare. Automated tests use mocked extraction, while manual testing exercises the real extraction provider.

test_cases.title: Multiple supported-field errors in low light

mock_extracted_fields.government_warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) Women should avoid alcohol during pregnancy. (2) Alcohol may affect driving and health.

notes: Low-light image with multiple intentional supported-field failures.
